greeting.speaker: npc
greeting.content: Hello, what can I do for you?

village-status.speaker: npc
village-status.content: We're managing, but food supplies are getting low.

scout-yes.speaker: npc
scout-yes.content: Alright, I'll head north and report back.

scout-no.speaker: npc
scout-no.content: I can't right now, I have other duties.

gather-request.label: Go gather food for the village

gather-yes.speaker: npc
gather-yes.content: Sure, I'll head to the fields.

gather-no.speaker: npc
gather-no.content: I need to rest first, maybe later.
